The board of directors of the inter-
state fair yesterday chose II. G.
Stimmel manager of the fair the
coming year to succeed George Mar
tim, resigned.


senator Ankeny yesterday pur-
chased a substantial interest in the
Old National bank and was elected a
member OF the board of directors to
NIL vacancy.


The Western Pine shippers assoc
citation will hold it's next regular
meeting Mt the Hotel Spokane ON
March I, At this meeting arrange
ments for future work will be per-
fected


Sergeant John Sullivan's 6-weeks,
old babe died Mt 5:e5 O'Clock yester-
day afternoon, The child was taken
i'll Thursday with pneumonia. The
funeral took place from the family
residence, 1918 Sinto avenue. today.


Alfred O'Brien. who sued the
Northern Pacific Railway company
for $4,000 damages. sustained while
unloading car wheels at the local
yards. has lost his suit, Negligence
on the part OF the foreman of the
company was alleged.


The Leidigh -Havens Lumber com.
pany of Kansas City will erect u
100000 plant here In the near future.

from the Hypotheekband in Morgan $
addition, upon which a planning and
cutting min plant will be established.
